{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303261479F4354671D5918ED3BE"}"},"total":1599},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7330530955051483966","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，剧情节奏紧凑，主角和配角的人物性格丰满且各有特色，师门上下一心除邪祟！师门背景深厚，不惧任何挑战！主角个人更是一个连的深厚背景，一心只有变强变强变强！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706773794,"group_id":"7300809950400367678","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无无无无无无无无无无无无无无无","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4EnKepVZuAhW4KKz1MnsOQ=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e44e04d9e2a94e1bbf23ad82c9ab5891~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793889&x-signature=6R88jG7xp2mQvgwT9q67E1T4Lj8%3D","user_id":"111173150789","user_name":"AI1996"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111173150789","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1643433645,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7300809950400367678","book_info":{"abstract":"茅山历代祖师爷曾经说过。
行走江湖，靠的就是底蕴二字。
能避开就避开，世道祸乱，多一事不如少一事。
避不开就交个朋友，交不了朋友就面对面谈判，谈判不了那便动手。
以上这三条使用时当谨记三个原则。
一，出手绝不留情，请神请圣请祖师，召雷召火召巽风。
二，动手之时选一个下风口，方便把骨灰扬干净。
三，动手之后请呼唤祖师，以便祖师无缝衔接出手。
钟旭穿越僵尸世界，得千鹤道长抚养成人。
有朝一日统子临，我命由我不由天。
法术盘身如岗风，罡气喷涌似狼烟。
秋生:“我师父咒法剑武请神之术无一不精通！”
【听着秋生的诉说，宿主感觉到艳羡；系统对之格外不忿，奖励宿主大神救我神术。
只要宿主在危急时刻喊出‘大神救我，弟子恭请’加请神后缀，便能请的任何神灵加持宿主己身！
并留言，此法慎用！】
石少坚:“我师父茅山代掌门，江湖人称雷电法王，压的无数妖魔鬼怪哀嚎不止。”
【石少坚的诉说令系统感到格外不忿。奖励宿主九天应元雷声普化天尊雷法。
并留言，修此雷法，当持身戒。】
茅山式微，兵祸为乱，三宝丢失，不配的祖山之名？
看我来重建茅山繁荣。
塑道兵，立祖庭。
多年后，看着眼前天庭诸部降下的接引金梯，钟旭逐渐陷入到了沉思中。
糟糕，我的系统，又不服了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b0907aa698fb2f38360301ab95345d1b","author":"赵吏是个老六","author_id":"","book_id":"7300809950400367678","book_name":"九叔：糟糕，我的系统又不服了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1455,"name":"风水秘术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1455&name=风水秘术&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7300812843090199102","read_count":"31101","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2139272"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"1023","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,穿越,灵异,九叔,同人,悬疑,风水秘术","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o1693dbf925cdb3f0471671517c8dd53d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779391574&x-signature=UlDIeloap1jezyT7ERr0m5KYJPQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1719275809681944","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"409"
